calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2012 Off Calendar

Application For Entry Of Defaul;T Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Robert Kashfian, Esq. for and with the plaintiff Ruthanne Feinberg, was sworn and direct examined.
Default(s) of Defendant Glocap Search LLC, a New York LLC. has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant for declaratory relief of the Independent Contractor Agreement between the parties, is declared null, void and unenforceable in California (no money judgment requested). See scanned doc for details of the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
